---
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=.@"]
---

# warning


```{julia}
# NOTE: 必须避免多个线程同时修改同一个内存位置.

# Calculate directly.
a = 0
@threads for i = 1:20
    tid = threadid()
    global a += 1
end
println(a) # which is not 20.

# Calculate correct.
a_threads = zeros(Float64, Threads.maxthreadid()) # Sums of combinations that contain each random unitary.
@threads for i = 1:20
    tid = threadid()
    a_threads[tid] += 1
end

a = sum(a_threads)
```
